titles.en: Reward of offering obligatory prayers during prime time
Reward of offering obligatory prayers during prime time

segments: : الصَّلَوَاتُ الْمَفْرُوضَاتُ فِی أَوَّلِ وَقْتِهَا إِذَا أُقِیمَ حُدُودُهَا أَطْیَبُ رِیحاً مِنْ قَضِیبِ الْآسِ حِینَ یُؤْخَذُ مِنْ شَجَرِهِ فِی طِیبِهِ وَ رِیحِهِ وَ طَرَاوَتِهِ فَعَلَیْکُمْ بِالْوَقْتِ الْأَوَّلِ.
arabic.text: : الصَّلَوَاتُ الْمَفْرُوضَاتُ فِی أَوَّلِ وَقْتِهَا إِذَا أُقِیمَ حُدُودُهَا أَطْیَبُ رِیحاً مِنْ قَضِیبِ الْآسِ حِینَ یُؤْخَذُ مِنْ شَجَرِهِ فِی طِیبِهِ وَ رِیحِهِ وَ طَرَاوَتِهِ فَعَلَیْکُمْ بِالْوَقْتِ الْأَوَّلِ.

segments: 1. Abi (rah) from Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Sa’d b. Abi Khalaf from Abi al-Hassan Musa (a.s.) who said: “If an obligatory prayer is offered in prime time fulfilling all the conditions a sweet smell would come out from it just like the sweet smell that comes out when a branch of tree is broken. Hence it is obligatory on you to offer Salaat at its prime time.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. Abi (rah) from Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Sa’d b. Abi Khalaf from Abi al-Hassan Musa (a.s.) who said: “If an obligatory prayer is offered in prime time fulfilling all the conditions a sweet smell would come out from it just like the sweet smell that comes out when a branch of tree is broken. Hence it is obligatory on you to offer Salaat at its prime time.”

narratorChain.raw: أَبِی ره عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ أَبِی خَلَفٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ مُوسَی ع قَالَ
